charts.title: Price History
charts.empty_hint: Prices are recorded automatically on each refresh. Pull to refresh on the Prices tab, then reopen this chart.
charts.no_history: Not enough history yet. Pull to refresh prices and try again.

prices.title: Gold & Silver Prices
prices.check_connection: Check your connection and try again.
prices.watchlist_full: Watchlist full — remove a pin first (max 8)

calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.egypt_21k_note: Showing 21K — the standard karat in Egypt's local market.
calculator.local_note: Using Egypt local {side} prices from iSagha
calculator.disclaimer: This calculator provides estimated values based on current market prices. Actual prices may vary.

alerts.title: Price Alerts
alerts.empty_active_msg: Create a price or percent-change alert for gold or silver. Alerts sync to your account and notify you in the background.
alerts.empty_history_msg: When an alert fires, it moves here with the price and time it triggered. You can reactivate any alert from history.
alerts.clear_history_confirm: Delete {count} triggered alert(s) from history? Active and snoozed alerts are not affected.
alerts.snack_invalid_price: Enter a valid target price per gram
alerts.snack_percent_max: Percent change must be 100% or less
alerts.save_failed: Could not save alert. Please try again.
alerts.baseline_note: Baseline is set to the current price when you save
alerts.use_24h_note: Uses the same 24h change shown on the Prices screen
alerts.auto_repeat_sub: Re-arm this alert automatically after it triggers

chatbot.title: Metals Bot
chatbot.placeholder: Ask me about gold and silver...
chatbot.api_key_required: Please add your OpenAI API key in settings
chatbot.error: Sorry, I couldn't process that request
chatbot.error_generic: I apologize, but I encountered an error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
chatbot.welcome:
Hello! I'm your gold and silver investment assistant. I can help you with:

• Market insights and price analysis
• Investment strategies (DCA, timing)
• Jewelry pricing and fairness checks
• Answering questions about precious metals
• Portfolio analysis and recommendations
• Scam detection and claim verification

How can I assist you today?
chatbot.qa_portfolio_prompt: How is my portfolio doing? Any recommendations?

chat_history.title: Chat History
chat_history.clear_all_confirm: This permanently deletes every saved conversation. This cannot be undone.
chat_history.empty_message: Your conversations with the AI assistant are saved here automatically, so you can revisit them anytime.
chat_history.delete_confirm: This conversation will be permanently deleted.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.local_value_note: Valued at Egypt local buy prices (iSagha)
portfolio.add_first: Add your first gold or silver holding
portfolio.add_to_start: Add a holding to start tracking
portfolio.delete_confirm: Remove {weight}g {metal} {karat}K from your portfolio? This cannot be undone.
portfolio.save_error: Could not save. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.convert_account: Convert your guest account to save data
profile.sign_in_to_save: Sign in to save your data
profile.notif_denied_body: Price alerts need notification permission. Enable it in your device Settings.
profile.notif_disable_in_settings_body: To disable notifications, use your device Settings for GoldSignal.
profile.price_side_sell: Sell — price when buying from jeweler
profile.price_side_buy: Buy — price when selling to jeweler
profile.watchlist_alerts_sub: Notify when a pinned metal moves more than 2% in 24h
profile.delete_account_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all your data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.privacy_open_failed: Could not open the privacy policy link.
profile.share_text: Track live gold & silver prices, alerts and your portfolio with GoldSignal: {url}
profile.verify_email_body: We sent a link to {email}. Verify to secure your account.
profile.verify_sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox
profile.widget_egp_note: EGP uses iSagha prices and your buy/sell side setting.
profile.widget_add_manual: Add widget: long-press home screen → Widgets → GoldSignal
profile.widget_pin_confirm: Confirm adding the widget on your home screen
profile.digest_enable_notif: Enable notifications to receive the daily digest.
profile.digest_note: Delivered within ~30 minutes of your chosen time, even when the app is closed. Uses your selected currency. Requires notifications to be enabled.
profile.reengage_sub: Occasional nudges about big gold moves and reminders to check prices.
profile.save_failed: Could not save profile. Try again.

auth.welcome_subtitle: Track precious metals prices with AI insights
auth.link_subtitle: Sign in to keep your data on this account
auth.signin_subtitle: Sign in to your GoldSignal account

auth.account_created: Account created — check your inbox to verify your email
auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.reset_sent_to: We sent a password reset link to {email}
auth.reset_instructions: Open the link in the email to choose a new password, then sign in again. Be sure to check your spam folder.
auth.reset_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

auth.apple_failed: Apple sign-in failed. Please try again.

savings.title: Savings Goals
savings.empty_msg: Set a target like "save 100g of gold" and track your progress as you add holdings to your portfolio.
savings.delete_confirm: This savings goal will be removed.
savings.save_error: Could not save goal. Please try again.

zakat.title: Zakat Calculator
zakat.prices_unavailable_msg: Zakat is calculated from current gold and silver prices. Refresh prices and try again.
zakat.nisab_note: Nisab = {grams}g {basis} ≈ {value}. Silver basis is recommended when combining assets.
zakat.disclaimer: Zakat of 2.5% is due on gold, silver and cash once their combined value reaches the nisab and a full lunar year (hawl) has passed. This is an estimate for guidance — consult a scholar for rulings, including on personal-use jewelry.

growth.sync_banner_body: Create a free account to save your portfolio, alerts, and preferences.
growth.spread_narrow: Spread is narrower than usual — may be a better time to buy from jewelers.
growth.spread_wide: Spread is wider than usual — selling to jewelers may fetch less.
growth.spread_normal: Spread is near its recent average.

onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.currency_body: We'll show gold and silver prices in this currency. You can change it anytime in Profile.
onboarding.watchlist_body: Select the prices you care about most. They'll appear at the top of Markets.
onboarding.notify_body: Enable notifications to get daily price digests and alert pop-ups.
onboarding.notify_digest_sub: Morning summary of gold & silver moves
onboarding.notify_alerts_sub: When your target price is hit
